differential_diagnoses: Dengue fever with capillary leak syndrome
next_steps: Send serum for Hantavirus-specific serology (IgM/IgG) and viral RNA (RT-PCR)
Initiate serial monitoring of hemoglobin and hematocrit to detect hemoconcentration
Send serum/urine for Leptospira PCR and microscopic agglutination test (MAT)
Perform bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) for microbiology, cytology, and fungal/bacterial cultures
Consult with public health authorities regarding potential zoonotic exposure
Continue supportive hemodynamic management focusing on judicious fluid resuscitation
